title: selago prostrata
intro: Selago prostrata, also known as Blue Ake, is a low-growing, spreading succulent plant native to South Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Selago prostrata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, Selago prostrata is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or topical creams, which can be used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
